x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Booking Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A booking feature that records the creation or registration of a financial entry in a specific account.

Comment:
Example:

Booking a deposit into a savings account

Recording a loan disbursement into a customer account

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction Booking Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A booking feature that records a specific financial transaction associated with a banking product.

Comment:
Example:

Booking a fund transfer between accounts

Booking a card payment transaction

x-enumeration-literals.name: Commitment Booking Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A booking feature used to record financial commitments or obligations that will result in future transactions.

Comment:
Example:

Booking a loan commitment before disbursement

Booking a credit line approval

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reservation Booking Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A booking feature that temporarily reserves or earmarks funds for a future transaction.

Comment:
Example:

Reserving funds for a card authorization

Booking a hold on a deposit for a pending payment

x-enumeration-literals.name: Installment Booking Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A booking feature that records scheduled payments or installments associated with a financial product.

Comment:
Example:

Booking monthly loan repayments

Booking installment payments for a credit purchase

x-enumeration-literals.name: Contract Booking Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A booking feature that records the financial contract or agreement associated with a banking product.

Comment:
Example:

Booking a loan agreement

Booking a deposit contract

x-enumeration-literals.name: Allocation Booking Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A booking feature that records how a financial amount is distributed across accounts, products, or obligations.

Comment:
Example:

Allocating a payment across principal, interest, and fees in a loan

Distributing a deposit into multiple sub-accounts
